title: Age of Steam  AW2 Generators
body:
This mod adds Ancient Warfare 2 styled power generators to Age of Steam. It includes the following blocks:

## The Water Wheel Generator:
## ![Age of Steam Water Wheel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cdd5f717d525300dca039d45dd268446d49bc72e.png)

The Water Wheel Generator is the most simple source of energy you can have. It is cheap and easy to construct  and provides a good amount of power at low speeds.  



## The Windmill Generator: Harness the Winds... Carefully
## ![Age of Steam Windmill](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc9a9fe4309800e79be00a48b43757ce9750df9c.png)

Behold the mighty WindMill Generator - A colossal beast of a construction, capable of churning out insane amounts of power. The size is up to you, but if you build a 19-meter monstrosity you can prepare for chaos. Its blades will spin - oh, they will spin like a caffeinated tornado, breaking even the sturdiest axles in half.

But here's the catch: if the wind takes a nap, your towering masterpiece may just stand there like a sulking giant refusing to budge. 



## The Stirling Generator:
## ![Age of Steam Stirling Generator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46dffd89fd55eb677a598dd6670957a3a82f14b3.png)

The Stirling Generator can be fueled by anything that burns. It does not provide high force like the Water Wheel or the Windmill generator, but it can sustain a decent torque at much higher speeds, reducing the need for gearboxes.
